Texts.UploadFailedMessage: Upload Failed: Unsupported file format or file size too large. Please ensure the file meets the required format and size limits, and try again.

Texts.DoctorAvailability:CannotUpdateBookedOrR: This slot cannot be modified because it has been reserved or booked. Cancel or reschedule the linked appointment first.
Texts.DoctorAvailability:CannotBulkDeleteWithB: Cannot delete all slots for this date and location because one or more slots are reserved or booked.
Texts.DoctorAvailability:CannotDeleteReference: This slot cannot be deleted because it is referenced by an existing appointment or change request.
Texts.Appointment:BookingDateInsideLeadTime: The selected appointment date is too soon. Choose a date at least {0} day(s) from today.
Texts.Appointment:BookingDatePastMaxHorizon: The selected appointment date is too far in the future for this appointment type. Choose a date no more than {0} day(s) from today.
Texts.Appointment:ReSubmitSourceNotRejected: You not allowed to re apply appointment
Texts.Appointment:RevalSourceNotApproved: You can not Re-eval this appointment request because it's not yet approved. Once it gets approved, You will be able to Re-eval this appointment request.
Texts.Appointment:RevalSourceNotApprovedAdminH: You can not Re-eval this appointment request because it's not yet approved. Please approve an appointment and try again.

Texts.AppointmentChangeRequest:AppointmentNotA: Changes are not allowed on this appointment in its current status.
Texts.AppointmentChangeRequest:CancelTimeWindo: This appointment cannot be cancelled or rescheduled because the date is too close. Cancellations require at least {0} day(s) advance notice.
Texts.AppointmentChangeRequest:EditAccessRequi: You do not have edit access to this appointment.
Texts.AppointmentChangeRequest:NewSlotNotAvail: The selected new appointment slot is no longer available.

Texts.SlotsConflictMessage: Some generated slots already exist. Please remove them before submitting.
Texts.CustomField:Max10ActivePerAppointmentTyp: Up to 10 active custom fields are allowed per Appointment Type. Deactivate or delete one before adding another.

Texts.Appointment:Modal:ApproveBody: This will notify all parties and book the slot. Continue?
Texts.Appointment:Modal:RejectReasonPlaceholde: Tell the booker why this is being rejected. Required.
Texts.Appointment:Modal:SendBackInstructions: Flag the fields the booker should revisit, then leave a note.
Texts.Appointment:Modal:SendBackNotePlaceholde: Explain what needs to change. The booker will see this on their resubmit screen.
Texts.Appointment:Modal:SectionDeferredHint: (form section ships in a later wave; flagging is informational only)
Texts.Appointment:Toast:ResubmitFailed: Save succeeded, but resubmit failed. Please try again.

Texts.NotificationTemplate:NotFound: No active notification template was found for the supplied id or template code.
Texts.Registration:ConfirmPasswordMismatch: Password and confirm password do not match.
Texts.Registration:FirmNameRequiredForAttorney: Firm Name is required for attorney roles.
Texts.Registration:RoleNotAllowedForPublicSign: Public registration is for Patient accounts only. Other roles must be invited by an administrator.
Texts.Subject: Subject
Texts.SystemParameter:NotSeeded: System parameters have not been seeded for this tenant. Please run the data seeder.
Texts.PackageDetail:OneActivePerAppointmentTyp: An active package already exists for this Appointment Type. Deactivate or delete it before creating another.
Texts.Document:InUse: This document template is still linked to one or more packages. Unlink it before deleting.
Texts.SystemParameter:Validation.CcEmailIdsToo: CC Email IDs exceed the maximum allowed length of {0} characters.
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Booking.LeadTimeM: Minimum minutes between request submit and the proposed appointment time. Default 1440 (1 day).
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Booking.MaxHorizo: Maximum minutes from now a QME appointment may be scheduled. Default 129600 (90 days).
Maximum minutes from now an AME appointment may be scheduled. Default 129600 (90 days).
Maximum minutes from now any other appointment type may be scheduled. Default 129600 (90 days).
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Booking.Appointme: Default duration for a new appointment slot. Default 60.
Days a Pending request may sit before the office is nudged. Default 7.
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Scheduling.Cancel: Minutes before slot during which a party-initiated cancel still counts as on-time. Default 2880 (2 days).
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Scheduling.AutoCa: Minutes past which a Pending request auto-rejects. Default 1440 (1 day).
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Scheduling.Remind: Cutoff for the day-before reminder job. Default 1440 (1 day).
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Scheduling.Pendin: Days a Pending request triggers an overdue notification. Default 3.
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Documents.JointDe: Days before the appointment by which joint declarations must be uploaded. Default 7.
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Notifications.CcE: Comma-separated email addresses CC'd on every all-parties notification email.
Texts.Setting:CaseEvaluation.Notifications.Off: Email address that receives 'new appointment request' notifications when a booker submits an appointment. Leave empty to disable office notifications -- bookers will still see new requests in the office's queue.
Texts.Login:VerificationLinkSent: We have sent a verification link to your registered email id, please verify your email address to login.
Texts.Login:ResendConfirmationEmailSent: Confirmation email re-sent. Please check your inbox.
Texts.Account:EmailNotConfirmedForPasswordRese: Please verify your email address before resetting your password.
Texts.Account:ResetPasswordTokenInvalid: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
Texts.Account:PasswordResetCodeSent: If the email is registered and verified, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
Texts.Account:PasswordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with the new password.
Texts.Account:PasswordChangedEmailSubject: Your password has been successfully changed - {0}
Texts.Account:PasswordResetEmailBody:
Hello {0},

You requested a password reset. Click the link below to set a new password:

Reset your password

If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.
Texts.Account:PasswordChangedEmailBody:
Hello {0},

Your password has been successfully changed. If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

Texts.Document:ImmutableForExternalUser: This document has already been accepted and cannot be modified.

Texts.ChangeRequest:InvalidRescheduleOutcome: Reschedule outcome must be RescheduledNoBill or RescheduledLate.
